name: 23-invalid-bom-ref-duplicate
description: Two sidecar components share the same bom-ref. Harness must reject at semantic-validation because JSON Schema cannot express uniqueness on a sub-field across array items without bespoke $dynamicRef machinery.
notes: bom-ref is the cross-file anchor between sidecar and CycloneDX. Duplicate bom-refs produce ambiguous policy-verdict and vulnerability attributions. This check is intra-sidecar, performed after schema-validation passes the structural shape.
